extraction_rule: Extract conversion PRINCIPLES. Never copy proprietary code or layouts.

patterns.name: Squeeze Page Hero
patterns.description: Single dominant headline + one primary CTA above fold. No navigation. Forces decision.
patterns.bb_status: LIVE — partial. Missing announcement bar overlay.
rules: Primary CTA visible without scrolling on mobile
Headline communicates product + location in one read
patterns.conversion_impact: HIGH — reduces bounce, increases first-action rate

patterns.name: Lead Magnet Gate
patterns.description: Offer discount or free asset to capture email BEFORE showing price.
incentive_options: Notify me when online ordering goes live
patterns.conversion_impact: MEDIUM — builds list before purchase decision

patterns.name: Offer Stack
patterns.description: Show product + bonus + guarantee stacked visually to increase perceived value.
patterns.bb_status: PARTIAL — structure built, prices TBD (M3 blocked on client)
patterns.anchor_strategy: Middle tier (6-Pack) highlighted as Most Popular
patterns.conversion_impact: HIGH — anchoring middle tier lifts average order value

patterns.name: Social Proof Block
patterns.description: 3-5 testimonials with name, location, product purchased. Placed BEFORE price reveal.
patterns.bb_status: LIVE — placeholder testimonials. Replace with real quotes after first pickup customers.
patterns.placement_rule: MUST appear before pricing section — always
patterns.conversion_impact: HIGH — social proof before ask reduces hesitation

patterns.name: Urgency Element
patterns.description: Countdown timer OR limited batch notice. Creates purchase urgency.
patterns.bb_implementation: Announcement bar → 'This week's batch: X bottles remaining'
patterns.conversion_impact: MEDIUM — effective for repeat buyers, less critical at MVP

patterns.name: Order Bump
patterns.description: Checkbox at Stripe checkout: 'Add X for $Y more'. 10-30% take rate.
patterns.bb_implementation: Add to Stripe checkout session line_items as optional add-on
patterns.conversion_impact: HIGH — single highest AOV lever without new page

patterns.name: Thank-You Upsell
patterns.description: After payment, offer related product before order 'closes'. One-click accept.

patterns.name: Sticky Mobile CTA Bar
patterns.description: Fixed bottom bar on mobile only, always visible at all scroll depths.
patterns.bb_file: app/page.tsx — fixed bottom div with md:hidden
patterns.conversion_impact: HIGH — mobile conversion lift, frictionless CTA access
